body.title: Implement EmitChannelRegistry — I/O surfaces for engram executor
body.result: emit_channels.py: EmitChannelRegistry singleton + 6 channels (basket, emotional_milieu, cognitive_milieu, console, web, discord). Delta values supported on emotional_milieu. get_registry() lazy init. 555 tests passing.
body.description: Named channels for EMIT instruction dispatch. Channels: emotional_milieu (writes arousal/valence/dominance to milieu state), cognitive_milieu, basket (trail state writeback — closes the loop), console, web, discord. Each channel: name, directionality, write(value, key) -> None. Singleton registered at boot. Distinct from acquisition channel registry (D230).
